description: Style NoteBright sandals for the summer from cobblerz with a handmade leatherette upper. This pretty colour pop pair epitomizes classic Parisian style inspired from the sunny coasts and beaches. Unfreeze those pastel hues with this delectable sandals for a balanced vibe this summer. Elevate your warm weather wardrobe with this stylish pair - we at the myntra office especially love the colouring on the plaush upper. Buy now before we're all sold out of this lovely style!Heel: 3"Product DetailsPink sandals with braided forefoot and midfoot strapZipped ankle closure with an ankle loopShort V-shaped heelTPU outsole with a plastic heel patchMaterial and CareLeatheretteUse a leather brush and conditioner to clean this product
